title: geranium nepalense f. roseum
intro: Geranium nepalense f. roseum, also known as the Himalayan geranium, is a plant species in the geranium family (Geraniaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Geranium nepalense f. roseum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of menopause, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
